findings.message: New write-path data-store function with no metric or span instrumentation. The delete_items_by_prefix function performs database operations (querying and deleting items, committing the transaction) without any observability instrumentation, making this write operation invisible to tracing and metrics systems.
findings.suggestion: Add span and metric instrumentation around the database operations. Consider wrapping the function body with a tracer.start_as_current_span() context and recording operation metrics (duration, row count affected). This will make the data-layer operations observable through distributed tracing and metrics collection.
